---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enhancement aligned with package goals
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the feature request.

## Problem

What limitation are you facing today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you want to change.

## Why This Belongs in Core

Explain why this should be part of Interactive Surface rather than app-level CSS.

## Alternatives Considered

What workarounds or alternatives did you evaluate?

## Potential Impact

Check all that apply:

- [ ] class API
- [ ] token contract
- [ ] accessibility behavior
- [ ] motion behavior
- [ ] browser behavior
- [ ] documentation
- [ ] tests

## Additional Context

Add examples, mockups, or references if useful.
